title: Arbitration Bar of India conducts survey to assess women’s representation in arbitration
description: The Arbitration Bar of India (ABI) is conducting a survey to understand the representation of women within the broader pool of arbitrators in the country. Conducted by ABI’s Inclusion and Diversity in Arbitrator Appointments Task Force, the survey seeks feedback from stakeholders on issues such as the number of appointments of women arbitrators, market preferences, and their professional backgrounds.Payal Chawla and Nandini Khaitan are the Co-Chairs of this Task Force and Dr. Amit George and May
